item.title: To the Usersub scum that keep downvote brigading my posts about Hungary
item.description:
Rightwing fuckers (or just one with lots of bots) are pissed Péter Magyar got sworn in today and that Hungary's now part of the EU again instead of being a sock puppet for Russia. Two attempts at a post about this good news for Hungary and 20 downvoters just so happen to appear at the exact same time to prevent them from reaching frontpage at exactly the right time.
To commemorate both a new PM and basically the country rejoining the EU, the parliment sung "Ode to Joy" (the European anthem) Magyar, in his first official speech, called on Hungarian President Tamás Sulyok to resign or be removed: "It's time to leave, Mr. President — while you still can." Sulyok, a Fidesz-backed Orbán ally, sat awkwardly watching all this in the Hungarian parliament.
item.dc:creator: Pasquinelthe2nd

item.title: Have not seen any info about this one
item.description: I hate that we're in a conspiracy bullshit timeline but the US elected conspiracy theorist clowns who probably think this is how to govern. Also we've all been making fun of Kash Patel's drinking problem and handling of the Epstein files but has anyone else wondered WHY he's developed a drinking problem?

item.dc:creator: ELKronos

item.title: Met on Imgur, Married 4 Years - Our Annual Anniversary Post!
item.description: In 2018 I met the love of my life as we commented back and forth on a meme we found on Imgur. Fast forward to him dropping into my DMs, exchanging numbers, eventually talking, meeting, imagining, planning…Nearly eight years later not a day has gone by that we haven’t been in each other’s lives. I couldn’t ask for a better friend, partner, husband, and co parent. I’m a bit late on the annual post but @BucketsOfWeed you are where my heart lives and I am grateful each and every day for the gift of your love in my life. Thank you, Imgur for bringing us together. And for all of you for cheering us on. <3 S&M
item.dc:creator: bunniestbunny

item.title: 8 Years of Litterbox! [OC]
item.description:
Would you believe it’s been 8 years since this first Litterbox Comic was posted? Thank you to all of you who have been here since the start and to every single one of you who have joined along the way! This comic wouldn’t be what it is without its wonderful fans! The animated pilot is coming along nicely and I can’t wait to share it with you all, just a liiiittttlle bit longer! In the meantime, I’m going to keep making comics! Here's some of the earliest ones!
Looking for a last minute Mother's Day gift? Give her the gift of a Litterbox Comics Patreon subscription! She’ll get new comics early, bonus panels, behind-the-scenes, high-res downloads & more! Super easy to gift: patreon.com/litterboxcomics/gift Choose any tier + number of months and she’ll get a nice email invite! The perfect “you get me” present for any tired mom who needs a laugh!
item.dc:creator: LitterboxComics

item.title: "Lavender Panthers"
item.description: a radical militarized gay group that existed in San Francisco from 1973 to 1974, organized by a gay preacher. Its goal was to defend the rights of the LGBT community with weapons in hand, as the police were inactive - attacks on gays and transvestites were almost never investigated.
item.dc:creator: BubbleButtParty565

item.title: 21 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol 251
item.description:
A mother in Caldwell, Idaho shared asking if people could organize a birthday parade for her son’s sixth birthday, as he is battling AML leukemia, since he's never attended kindergarten
Text convo between mother and landlord The goody bag was fresh picked veggies from mum's garden from u/UkikoBestGirlFiteMe
A mother orca and her two calves curiously approach a swimmer
Earth means Mother
Using a wet toothbrush to groom your cat reminds them of their mother
item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

item.dc:creator: kenistod

item.title: This is Nothing
item.description: This is just how I get psyched up before I shoot my Youtube videos. I am posting this so I can post the link to my reddit. If you upvote it and people get mad at me for making the FP that's on you. THEN PUT IT TO PRIVATE they'll say. No. Absolutely not. That defeats the entire point. If I suffer the psychological damage of accidentally hitting the front page of Imgur then WE suffer together as a COMMUNITY. Also people do not understand what happens before I hit record on one of these videos. They think I just calmly sit down and go “today we’re discussing trans internet culture” No. There’s a full pregame ritual. At some point before filming I WILL end up standing motionless in my kitchen staring at a tortilla for like fifteen straight minutes while mentally rehearsing a counterargument to a comment that has not been written yet by a person named like “LogicFan1977.” And then somehow that spirals into me thinking about Ace Ventura again. Which is dangerous. Because once I start thinking about Ace Ventura I start thinking about the fact that there are fully grown adults online who will hear me say: “hey maybe forcing an entire room of men to projectile vomit because they kissed a trans woman was kinda weird... Seeing that as a kid was weird for me actually” and they respond like I just personally burned down the Library of Alexandria. Then I start imagining the exact person typing: “SOUNDS LIKE SOMEONE CANT TAKE A JOKE” while their profile picture is a Ford F-150 taken from 2 feet away. Then THAT somehow leads me into thinking about Firefly discourse again because my brain is basically one of those conspiracy corkboards at this point. If you mapped my thought process with red string it would eventually connect: Ace Ventura - Tumblr - Joss Whedon - Moth Girl - Animorphs - Reddit front page - me eating shredded cheese at 1am in fishnets editing pictures. And the worst part is by the time I actually hit record I’ve convinced myself I’m about to deliver the “I Have A Dream” speech except the topic is “why people got weirdly mad at me for talking about how I enjoyed Japanese vending machines.” And then inevitable just end up talking about IBS... probably due to that 1am cheese now I think about it. Then the camera turns on and I’m like: “Hey everybody, it's AlsoAshley” Meanwhile my fitbit is warning me about elevated heart rate because I spent the last hour pacing around my room listening to the same hyperpop remix like I’m preparing to storm Normandy instead of making a YouTube video called “The Internet Thinks I’m a Virgin” Anyway if this hits the front page and somebody writes a twelve paragraph comment about how women on the internet are ruining society I need everyone to remember this was YOUR choice. You enabled this.
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley
